heroSubheading: Limited Release: Batch 014 now curing in the studio.
collectionHeadline: Rooted in Earth, Released in Air.
collectionDescription: Each vessel is part of a numbered micro-batch, hand-labeled and inspected for peak botanical clarity.
innerCircleDescription: Our batches often sell out in days. Join our list to receive early access to new scent drops and personal ritual invitations.

testimonials.quote: The scent profile is unlike anything mass-produced. It fills the room without overwhelming the senses.
testimonials.author: Elena R.

testimonials.quote: I reuse the stoneware vessels for my succulents. They are truly objects of art, even after the burn.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: A ritual I look forward to every evening. This is the soul of my living room.
testimonials.author: Sarah L.
